name: Four Star Rugelach+ Cinnamon Twists
recipeIngredient: Butter, chilled and cut into slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain cottage cheese through a sieve over a bowl for at least 2 hours, tossing occasionally. Reserve 1 cup of the drained cheese for the dough.
2. Combine flour and salt; mix until just combined.
3. Scatter butter pieces over the flour mixture and pulse with on/off pulses until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Add reserved cottage cheese to the mixture and pulse until a cohesive ball forms.
5. Divide the dough into four portions, shape each into a flat disk, wrap in plastic, and refrigerate for at least 4 hours or freeze up to 1 month.
6. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Line a baking sheet with foil.
7. Combine sugar and cinnamon.
8. Remove one dough package from the refrigerator; let rest for 10 minutes before rolling on a lightly floured surface into a 10-inch circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
9. Spread apricot jam thinly over the dough. Sprinkle with cinnamon-sugar mixture, then walnuts and currants.
10. Roll up the dough using a rolling pin to press filling ingredients into the dough; cut each into 16 pie-shaped wedges.
11. Place the wedges about 1 inch apart on the foil-lined sheet. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
12. Toward the end of baking, if pastries are browning too much from jam oozing out, move them to a clean spot on the sheet. Cool for 5 minutes before transferring rugelach to a wire rack.
Cinnamon Twists:
- Combine powdered sugar and cinnamon in a small bowl.
- Roll out 1/4 of the dough into an 11 x 12-inch rectangle about 1/8 inch thick.
- Scatter with the cinnamon-sugar mixture, then cut into 1-inch wide strips.
- Twist each strip to form Cinnamon Twists.
